# Third-party Assets

This folder contains verified downloads used or reserved for Close AI.

## Kenney New Platformer Pack 1.1

- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/new-platformer-pack
- Local path: `assets/third_party/kenney_new-platformer-pack-1.1/`
- License: CC0 1.0 Universal
- Use: enemy sprite candidates such as slime, fly, saw, worm, and related platformer creatures.

## PeriTune

- Source: https://peritune.com/blog/2026/02/06/ancient_gust/
- Local paths:
  - `assets/third_party/peritune/Ancient_Gust_Retro_3.mp3`
  - `assets/third_party/peritune/Ancient_Gust_Retro_6.mp3`
  - `assets/third_party/peritune/Ancient_Gust_Retro_9.mp3`
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
- Credit: Music by PeriTune.
- Use: battle / motion BGM candidates.

- Source: https://peritune.com/blog/2026/04/06/the-city-breathes-your-name/
- Local path: `assets/third_party/peritune/The_City_Breathes_Your_Name.mp3`
- License: PeriTune free material terms; attribution recommended by site usage notes.
- Credit: Music by PeriTune.
- Use: finale / post-game BGM candidate.

## Mixkit

- Source: https://mixkit.co/free-sound-effects/impact/
- Local path: `assets/third_party/mixkit/cinematic-whoosh-deep-impact-1143.mp3`
- License: Mixkit Free License
- Use: dash impact / boss hit SFX candidate.

- Source: https://mixkit.co/free-sound-effects/ui/
- Local path: `assets/third_party/mixkit/ui-zoom-out-2619.wav`
- License: Mixkit Free License
- Use: authored ShaderButton hover / press UI SFX source.

## Search Notes

- Boss-specific sprite download was attempted through the verified adapter workflow but did not produce a usable verified hit.
